title: A Quantitative Study of Oxidation Products of Iodine at the End  Points of the Titration of Mercuric and Silver Salts with  Iodine-Iodide Solutions
author: Kshitish Chandra Seal
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A quantitative study of a reaction mechanism in the tritration of mercuric or silver salts with iodine-iodide solution under certain conditions has been made, which shows that iodine is oxidised to hypoiodous acid and iodate.
steps_raw: A quantitative study of a reaction mechanism in the tritration of mercuric or silver salts with iodine-iodide solution under certain conditions has been made, which shows that iodine is oxidised to hypoiodous acid and iodate.
